title: Block Components Liquid Detection
description: The definitions for how a block behaves when detecting liquid. Only one rule definition is allowed per liquid type - if multiple are specified, the first will be used and the rest will be ignored.

detection_rules.title: Detection Rules
detection_rules.description:
Properties:
• can_contain_liquid (boolean) = false
• liquid_type (string) = water
• on_liquid_touches (string) = blocking
• stops_liquid_flowing_from_direction (object) = []
• use_liquid_clipping (boolean) = false
